# Stack commands

Every text command understood by the simulator — usable in scenario files, the
[console](../guides/console.md), the REST [`stack/` endpoint](../guides/rest-api.md),
or [`minisky.stack.stack()`](../api/stack.md) from Python. Commands are
case-insensitive.

Argument conventions: optional arguments are enclosed in `[...]`; `callsign` is an
aircraft callsign; `alt` accepts flight levels (`FL100`), feet, or metres; `spd`
accepts CAS in knots or Mach (below 1); `latlon` accepts coordinates or any named
waypoint, navaid, airport, or aircraft.

<!-- This file is generated by scripts/gen_command_docs.py — do not edit by hand. -->

| Command | Usage | Description | Synonyms |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `ADDWPT` | `ADDWPT callsign, wpt, [alt, spd, wpt, wpt]` | Add a waypoint to the route. |  |
| `ADDWPTMODE` | `ADDWPTMODE callsign, [wpt,alt]` | Changes the mode of the ADDWPT command to add waypoints of type 'mode'. |  |
| `AFTER` | `AFTER callsign, wpt, addwpt, waypoint, [alt, spd]` | Add a waypoint after another waypoint in the route. |  |
| `ALT` | `ALT callsign, alt, [vspd]` | Select autopilot altitude command. |  |
| `ASAS` | `ASAS [ON/OFF]` | Select a Conflict Detection method. | `CD`, `CDMETHOD` |
| `AT` | `AT callsign, wpt, [DEL] ALT/SPD/DO alt/spd/stack command` | Set or show altitude and/or speed constraints at a waypoint. |  |
| `ATALT` | `callsign ATALT alt cmd ` | When aircraft at given altitude , execute the command |  |
| `ATDIST` | `callsign ATDIST pos dist cmd ` | When aircraft passing this distance (in nm) to position, execute the command |  |
| `ATSPD` | `callsign ATSPD spd cmd ` | When aircraft reaches given speed, execute the command |  |
| `BANK` | `BANK callsign bankangle[deg]` | Set or show bank limit for this vehicle | `BANKLIM` |
| `BEFORE` | `BEFORE callsign, wpt, addwpt, waypoint, [alt, spd]` | Add a waypoint before another waypoint in the route. |  |
| `BOX` | `BOX name,lat,lon,lat,lon,[top,bottom]` | Define a box-shaped area |  |
| `CASMACHTHR` | `CASMACHTHR threshold` | Set a threshold below which speeds should be considered as Mach numbers |  |
| `CIRCLE` | `CIRCLE name,lat,lon,radius,[top,bottom]` | Define a circle-shaped area |  |
| `CLRCRECMD` | `CLRCRECMD` | CLRCRECMD will clear CRECMD list of commands aircraft creation |  |
| `CRE` | `CRE callsign,type,lat,lon,hdg,alt,spd` | Create an aircraft | `CREATE` |
| `CRECMD` | `CRECMD cmdline (to be added after aircraft id )` | Add a command for each aircraft to be issued after creation of aircraft |  |
| `CRECONFS` | `CRECONFS id, type, targetid, dpsi, cpa, tlos_hor, dH, tlos_ver, spd` | Create an aircraft that is in conflict with 'targetid' |  |
| `DATE` | `DATE [day,month,year,HH:MM:SS.hh]` | Set simulation date |  |
| `DEFWPT` | `DEFWPT wpname,lat,lon,[DELETE/FIX/VOR/DME/NDB/DEL]` | Define (or delete) a waypoint only for this scenario/run |  |
| `DEL` | `DEL callsign/ALL/WIND/shape` | Delete command (aircraft, wind, area) | `DELETE` |
| `DELAY` | `DELAY time, cmdline` | Delay a stack command until a specific simulation time. |  |
| `DELRTE` | `DELRTE callsign` | Delete the complete route for an aircraft. |  |
| `DELWPT` | `DELWPT callsign,wpt` | Delete a waypoint from a route. |  |
| `DEST` | `DEST callsign, latlon/airport, casmach (= CASkts/Mach)` | Set destination of aircraft, aircraft will fly to this airport. |  |
| `DIRECT` | `DIRECT callsign, wpt` | Go direct to a specified waypoint in the route. |  |
| `DTLOOK` | `DTLOOK [time, callsign...]` | Set the lookahead time (in [hh:mm:]sec) for conflict detection. |  |
| `DTNOLOOK` | `DTNOLOOK [time, callsign...]` | Set the interval (in [hh:mm:]sec) in which conflict detection is skipped after a conflict resolution. |  |
| `ECHO` | `ECHO txt` | Show a text in command window for user to read | `PRINT` |
| `GETWIND` | `GETWIND lat, lon, [alt]` | Get wind at a specified position (and optionally at altitude). |  |
| `GROUP` | `GROUP [grname, (areaname OR callsign,...) ]` | Add aircraft to a group. OR all aircraft in given area. |  |
| `HDG` | `HDG callsign,hdg (deg,True or Magnetic)` | Autopilot select heading command. |  |
| `HELP` | `HELP [cmd, subcmd]` | Display general help text or help text for a specific command. |  |
| `HOLD` | `HOLD` | Pause(hold) simulation | `PAUSE` |
| `IC` | `IC scenario_filename` | Load a scenario filename. |  |
| `LINE` | `LINE name,lat,lon,lat,lon` | Draw a line on the radar screen |  |
| `LISTRTE` | `LISTRTE callsign, [pagenr]` | Show list of route in window per page of 5 waypoints. |  |
| `LNAV` | `LNAV callsign,[ON/OFF]` | LNAV (lateral FMS mode) switch for autopilot. |  |
| `LSVAR` | `LSVAR path.to.variable` | Inspect any variable in a simulation |  |
| `MAGVAR` | `MAGVAR lat,lon` | Show magnetic variation/declination at position | `MAGDEC`, `MAGDECL`, `VAR` |
| `MCRE` | `MCRE n,[lat,lon,lat,lon,type,alt,spd]` | Multiple random create of n aircraft in current view |  |
| `MOVE` | `MOVE callsign,lat,lon,[alt,hdg,spd,vspd]` | Move an aircraft to a new position |  |
| `NOISE` | `NOISE [ON/OFF]` | Turbulence/noise switch |  |
| `NORESO` | `NORESO callsign...` | ADD or Remove aircraft that nobody will avoid. |  |
| `OP` | `OP` | Start/Run simulation or continue after hold | `CONTINUE`, `RUN`, `START` |
| `ORIG` | `ORIG callsign, latlon/airport` | Set origin of aircraft. |  |
| `PERFSTATS` | `PERFSTATS callsign` | Show the performace information of an aircraft. | `PERFDATA`, `PERFINFO` |
| `PLUGINS` | `PLUGINS [LIST/LOAD, plugin_name]` | List available plugins or load a plugin | `PLUGIN` |
| `POLY` | `POLY name,[lat,lon,lat,lon, ...]` | Define a polygon-shaped area | `POLYGON` |
| `POLYALT` | `POLYALT name,top,bottom,lat,lon,lat,lon, ...` | Define a polygon-shaped area in 3D: between two altitudes |  |
| `POLYLINE` | `POLYLINE name,lat,lon,lat,lon,...` | Draw a multi-segment line on the radar screen | `LINES`, `POLYLINES` |
| `POS` | `POS callsign/waypoint` | Get info on aircraft, airport or waypoint | `AIRPORT`, `AIRWAY`, `AIRWAYS`, `AWY`, `RUNWAYS` |
| `PRIORULES` | `PRIORULES [flag, priocode]` | Define priority rules (right of way) for conflict resolution. |  |
| `QUIT` | `QUIT` | Quit program/Stop simulation | `CLOSE`, `END`, `EXIT`, `STOP` |
| `REALTIME` | `REALTIME [ON/OFF]` | En-/disable realtime running allowing a variable timestep. | `RT` |
| `RESET` | `RESET` | Reset simulation |  |
| `RESO` | `RESO [name]` | Select a Conflict Resolution method. |  |
| `RESOOFF` | `RESOOFF callsign...` | ADD or Remove aircraft that will not avoid anybody else. |  |
| `RFACH` | `RFACH [factor]` | Set resolution factor horizontal. |  |
| `RFACV` | `RFACV [factor]` | Set resolution factor vertical. |  |
| `RSZONEDH` | `RSZONEDH [zonedh]` | Set resolution factor vertical, but then with absolute value. |  |
| `RSZONER` | `RSZONER [zoner]` | Set resolution factor horizontal, but then with absolute value. |  |
| `RTA` | `RTA callsign, wpt, time` | Add RTA to waypoint record. |  |
| `SCENARIO` | `SCENARIO name` | Sets the scenario name for the current simulation. |  |
| `SCHEDULE` | `SCHEDULE a stack command at a specific simulation time.` | Schedule a stack command at a specific simulation time. |  |
| `SEED` | `SEED value` | Set seed for all functions using a randomizer (e.g.mcre,noise) |  |
| `SELECTIMPL` | `SELECTIMPL [classname, implname]` | Select implementation for a replaceable class (e.g., SELECTIMPL AUTOPILOT MYAUTOPILOT) | `IMPL`, `IMPLEMENT`, `IMPLEMENTATION` |
| `SPD` | `SPD callsign,casmach (= CASkts/Mach)` | Select autopilot speed. |  |
| `SWTOC` | `SWTOC callsign,[ON/OFF]` | Switch ToC logic (=climb early) on/off. |  |
| `SWTOD` | `SWTOD callsign,[ON/OFF]` | Switch ToD logic (=climb early) on/off. |  |
| `THR` | `THR callsign, IDLE/0.0/throttlesetting/1.0/AUTO(default)` | Set throttle or autotothrottle(default) |  |
| `TIME` | `TIME RUN(default) / HH:MM:SS.hh / REAL / UTC ` | Set simulated clock time |  |
| `TRAIL` | `TRAIL ON/OFF, [dt] OR TRAIL callsign colour` | Toggle aircraft trails on/off | `TRAILS` |
| `UNGROUP` | `UNGROUP grname, callsign` | Remove aircraft from a group |  |
| `VNAV` | `VNAV callsign,[ON/OFF]` | Switch on/off VNAV mode, the vertical FMS mode (autopilot). |  |
| `VS` | `VS callsign,vspd (ft/min)` | Vertical speed command (autopilot). |  |
| `WIND` | `WIND lat,lon,[alt],dir,spd[,alt,dir,spd,...] or WIND lat,lon,DEL` | Define a wind vector as part of the 2D or 3D wind field. |  |
| `ZONEDH` | `ZONEDH [height, callsign...]` | Set the vertical separation distance (i.e., half of the protected zone height) in feet. |  |
| `ZONER` | `ZONER [radius, callsign...]` | Set the horizontal separation distance (i.e., the radius of the protected zone) in nautical miles. |  |
